input.background: Identify which of these statements are true and which are false.
input.question: The closer r is to —1 or 1, the stronger the linear relation between X and Y.

r.description: The correlation coefficient that measures the strength and direction of the linear relationship between variables X and Y.

X.description: One of the variables involved in the linear relationship being analyzed.

Y.description: The other variable involved in the linear relationship being analyzed.
